fields.acceptance_criteria: agent-harness/ dir with agent-shared/agent-core/agent-server/agent-tui/agent-web members registered in root Cargo.toml; agent-shared exposes versioned tagged serde lifecycle event + session enums that compile on native and wasm32; workspace builds clean.
fields.title: [agent-harness][CH1] Workspace + crate scaffolding + shared protocol contracts
fields.validation_plan: Fast: cargo fmt --check + cargo check -p agent-shared (native and wasm32). Primary: cargo test -p agent-shared (schema round-trip + version-tag tests). Manual: none. Failure logs: target/test-logs/.
